summary: Mobile PWA Phase 1-2 testing completed successfully. All mobile navigation, header, More page, and i18n translation features verified working correctly.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps with Profile and More nav items on mobile viewport - may cause click interception issues for real users

passed_tests: Mobile bottom navigation displays correctly with 5 items: Dashboard, Portfolios, Wallet, Profile, More
Mobile header shows user greeting 'Добрый день,' and user name when logged in
Mobile 'More' page (/more) displays menu sections correctly with i18n translations
Navigation active state highlights current page correctly (text-primary class)
Mobile layout renders only on screens < 768px width (show-mobile class)
Desktop layout renders on screens >= 768px width (hide-mobile class)
Login flow works on mobile viewport
All pages accessible via mobile navigation: /dashboard, /portfolios, /wallet, /settings, /more
i18n translations work for Russian (RU) - nav labels: Главная, Портфели, Кошелёк, Профиль, Ещё
i18n translations work for English (EN) - nav labels: Home, Strategies, Wallet, Profile, More
i18n translations work for Kazakh (KZ) - nav labels: Басты бет, Стратегиялар, Әмиян, Профиль, Тағы
More page sections display correctly: Аккаунт, Настройки, Документы, Поддержка
Mobile logout button present with correct i18n text
Mobile header shows back button on sub-pages (settings, history, support)
Mobile header shows logo on main pages (dashboard)
User tier badge displays in mobile header
Desktop layout hides mobile-bottom-nav and mobile-header correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA Phase 1-2 implementation verified. CSS classes show-mobile/hide-mobile control visibility at 768px breakpoint. Mobile viewport tested at 390x844 (iPhone 14). Use ':visible' selector to target visible elements since both desktop and mobile layouts exist in DOM. Language switching works via Settings > Preferences tab > Language dropdown. All 3 languages (RU/KZ/EN) have complete translations for mobile navigation keys.

css_classes.show_mobile: display: block on mobile, display: none on desktop
css_classes.hide_mobile: display: none on mobile, display: block on desktop
